pokemon:bounsweet.name: Bounsweet
pokemon:bounsweet.summary: Although it’s too sugary for human consumption, Bounsweet’s sweat can be watered down into a juice with just the right amount of sweetness.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Although it’s too sugary for human consumption, Bounsweet’s sweat can be watered down into a juice with just the right amount of sweetness.
When under attack, it secretes a sweet and delicious sweat. The scent only calls more enemies to it.
A delectable aroma pours from its body. They are often swallowed whole by Toucannon lured by that wafting deliciousness.
Its body gives off a sweet, fruity scent that is extremely appetizing to bird Pokémon.
It tries to resist being swallowed by a bird Pokémon by spinning the sepals on its head. It’s usually a fruitless attempt.
Because of its sweet, delicious aroma, bird Pokémon are always after it, but it’s not intelligent enough to care.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Although it’s too sugary for human consumption, Bounsweet’s sweat can be watered down into a juice with just the right amount of sweetness.

pokemon:steenee.name: Steenee
pokemon:steenee.summary: This Pokémon is always bouncing around energetically. Other Pokémon are attracted by its lively appearance and pleasant aroma.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon is always bouncing around energetically. Other Pokémon are attracted by its lively appearance and pleasant aroma.
Any Corvisquire that pecks at this Pokémon will be greeted with a smack from its sepals followed by a sharp kick.
The sepals on its head developed to protect its body. These are quite hard, so even if pecked by bird Pokémon, this Pokémon is totally fine.
As it twirls like a dancer, a sweet smell spreads out around it. Anyone who inhales the scent will feel a surge of happiness.
It bounces around, swinging the sepals on its head with abandon. They’re quite painful when they smack you!
It’s protected by its hard sepals, so it plays with bird Pokémon without worry. They peck it relentlessly, but it doesn’t care.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon is always bouncing around energetically. Other Pokémon are attracted by its lively appearance and pleasant aroma.

pokemon:tsareena.name: Tsareena
pokemon:tsareena.summary: A Pokémon known for the beauty of its well-shaped legs, it sometimes appears as a mascot in advertisements for beauty salons.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: A Pokémon known for the beauty of its well-shaped legs, it sometimes appears as a mascot in advertisements for beauty salons.
A kick from the hardened tips of this Pokémon’s legs leaves a wound in the opponent’s body and soul that will never heal.
Its long, striking legs aren’t just for show but to be used to kick with skill. In victory, it shows off by kicking the defeated, laughing boisterously.
This feared Pokémon has long, slender legs and a cruel heart. It shows no mercy as it stomps on its opponents.
A Pokémon with an aggressive personality and a mastery of kicking, it cackles every time it kicks an opponent.
A master of grand and beautiful kicks, it can knock out even kickboxing champions with a single blow.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: A Pokémon known for the beauty of its well-shaped legs, it sometimes appears as a mascot in advertisements for beauty salons.
